text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer, the black sheep of the Mejiro
family. She ran from her family, but learned how
to run her own way, and it's taken her all the way
to the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With some help from her bestie, Mejiro Palmer is
set to tell a less than typical Mejiro story.
